predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: is_common_property_of_spouses
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the common matrimonial property of the deceased person and their spouse.

predicates.name: is_undivided_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset is held in undivided co-ownership exclusively between the deceased and their spouse.

predicates.name: is_own_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own (separate) estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24 with respect to the deceased.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25 with respect to the deceased.

predicates.name: deed_or_will_excludes_usufruct_on_reversion_asset
predicates.description: The deed of gift or testament provides otherwise regarding usufruct on the reversion asset for the deceased's estate.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_share_in_common_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the deceased's share in the common or exclusively undivided property.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_own_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct over the asset belonging to the deceased's own separate estate.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_reversion_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct over the asset subject to the right of legal reversion, unless the deed or will provides otherwise.
